title: Rafa's Morning — Every Single Day
description: Present Simple in action through Rafa's daily routine. He WAKES, he SHAVES, he DRIVES. The -s that only lives on HE/SHE/IT.
summary_pt_br: A rotina matinal do Rafa em Present Simple. Reforço do -s em he/she/it, verbos irregulares do cotidiano (have, go, do), e a diferença entre DO e MAKE.

scenes.text_en:
Rafa WAKES at five. He SHAVES his chin.
He MAKES a strong coffee. He LETS the morning begin.
He HAS his breakfast. He PUTS on his shoes.
He DRIVES to the beach. He NEVER has the blues.
scenes.text_pt:
O Rafa ACORDA às cinco. RASPA o queixo.
FAZ um café forte. DEIXA a manhã nascer, em desvio.
TOMA café. CALÇA os sapatos.
DIRIGE pra praia. Sem TRISTEZA, sem atos.

scenes.title: DO vs MAKE — the two confused twins
scenes.body_en: DO = perform a task, an activity. DO homework, DO the dishes, DO exercise. MAKE = create / produce something. MAKE coffee, MAKE a cake, MAKE a decision. Brazilians often use 'fazer' for both — in English, pick carefully.
scenes.body_pt: DO = realizar uma tarefa, atividade. DO homework, DO the dishes. MAKE = criar/produzir. MAKE coffee, MAKE a decision. Em português 'fazer' cobre os dois; em inglês você escolhe.

examples.en: I do my homework and make a sandwich.
examples.pt: Faço a lição (DO) e faço um sanduíche (MAKE).

examples.en: She does yoga and makes plans.
examples.pt: Ela faz yoga (DO) e faz planos (MAKE).

exercise.question: Complete: 'He ___ coffee every morning.' (fazer)
exercise.explanation: MAKES coffee — producing/creating it. Plus the -s for HE.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Fazer café = MAKE. E com HE, adiciona -s.

exercise.question: Complete: 'She ___ her homework at night.' (fazer a lição)
exercise.explanation: DO homework. With SHE, DO becomes DOES.

turns.en: Do you make tacos every day?
I do. And I do the dishes afterwards.
turns.pt: Faço. E depois faço a louça.

turns.en: My mother makes dinner. She doesn't make lunch.
turns.pt: Minha mãe faz o jantar. Não faz o almoço.

exercise.explanation: Five pairs. Memorize them as chunks, not word-by-word.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Memorize como blocos fixos, não palavra por palavra.

exercise.question: Which is correct?
exercise.explanation: DOESN'T (for she) + base verb (MAKE, not makes).
exercise.hint_pt_br: Doesn't + verbo na forma base. 'She doesn't make', não 'doesn't makes'.

scenes.title: Rafa's morning routine
scenes.pt_summary: Rotina matinal — present simple + frequency adverbs.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hi! Come see how I start my day.
turns.pt: Oi! Vem ver como começo meu dia.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: What time do you wake up?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I always wake up at five thirty.
turns.pt: Sempre acordo às cinco e meia.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Wow, that is early. What do you do first?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I usually drink a coffee and check the weather.
turns.pt: Geralmente tomo um café e vejo o tempo.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Do you eat breakfast at home?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: No, I never eat at home. I eat at the truck.
turns.pt: Não, nunca como em casa. Como no food truck.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Eggs with toast and fresh orange juice.
turns.pt: Ovos com torrada e suco de laranja.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: It is. Now I am ready for the day.
turns.pt: É sim. Agora tô pronto pro dia.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Rafa's Morning — Every Single Day". Present Simple in action through Rafa's daily routine. He WAKES, he SHAVES, he DRIVES. The -s that only lives on HE/SHE/IT. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Rafa's Morning — Every Single Day". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'Rafa's Morning — Every Single Day'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "Rafa's Morning — Every Single Day".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: VOA Learning English
sources.pt_hint: Notícias em inglês lento — ótimo para ouvido iniciante.
